channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Letters to the editor debate pipelines, federal unity, and regional tensions over energy policy in Canada
item.description: This collection of letters to the editor reflects a range of perspectives on Canadian federal politics, energy infrastructure, and regional tensions, particularly between Alberta, British Columbia, an...

item.title: President Marcos Jr delivers address before Japan’s National Diet during state visit
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. delivered an address before Japan’s National Diet on Thursday, May 28, 2026, as part of his four-day state visit to Japan. The National Diet address is considered a rare...

item.title: NDC schedules primaries for May 28, shifts to manual voting due to limited time
item.description: The National Democratic Congress (NDC) don announce say dem go start their primary elections on May 28, 2026, as dem rush to meet the timetable set by the Independent National Electoral Commission (IN...

item.title: Robin Hurlstone, former partner of Dame Joan Collins, dies in London
item.description: Robin Hurlstone, an Old Etonian art dealer best known for his 13-year relationship with actress Dame Joan Collins, has died peacefully in London, according to his family. He was described as being lov...

item.title: Pakistan military reiterates defence commitment on Youm-e-Takbeer anniversary
item.description: Pakistan’s top military leadership has jointly marked the 28th anniversary of Youm-e-Takbeer, reaffirming their strong commitment to national defence and security. According to the Inter-Services Publ...

item.title: Saudi Interior Minister praises Pakistan’s diplomatic role in regional de-escalation during meeting with Mohsin Naqvi
item.description: Saudi Interior Minister Abdulaziz bin Saud Al Saud has appreciated Pakistan’s constructive role in reducing regional tensions during a high-level meeting with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi held in Mi...

item.title: U.S. restores sanctions on UN special rapporteur on Palestinian territories following appeals court ruling
item.description: The United States has reimposed sanctions on Francesca Albanese, a United Nations special rapporteur responsible for monitoring human rights in the Palestinian territories, following a decision by an ...

item.title: Utumishi Girls Academy Fire in Gilgil Leaves at Least 16 Students Dead and Parents in Grief
item.description: Kenyans are in deep shock following a tragic fire incident that occurred at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, in the early hours of Thursday, May 28, 2026. The fire reportedly broke out...

item.title: Joe ‘Ferrari’ Sibanyoni applies for urgent court order to stop arrest in extortion case amid jurisdiction dispute
item.description: Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni, together with his co-accused Bafana Sindane, has approached the courts on an urgent basis in an attempt to prevent their arrest in an ongoing extortion an...

item.title: Standard Chartered Bank Tanzania announces leadership transition as Herman Kasekende steps down
item.description: Ugandan banking veteran Herman Kasekende has officially stepped down from his position as Chief Executive Officer and Head of Coverage at Standard Chartered Bank Tanzania, effective May 26, 2026. His ...

item.title: DFA clarifies arrests of Chinese nationals in the Philippines are based on evidence, not nationality
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) of the Philippines clarified that law enforcement actions involving Chinese nationals in the country are strictly based on evidence and specific violations of P...

item.title: Karnataka leadership transition: Siddaramaiah signals resignation as DK Shivakumar set to take over
item.description: Karnataka’s political landscape witnessed a major development on Thursday as Chief Minister Siddaramaiah held a high-profile breakfast meeting at his official residence ‘Kaveri’ with Deputy Chief Mini...

item.title: Diane Cilento, Australian Actress Known for Film, Theatre, and Independent Spirit
item.description: Diane Cilento (1933–2011) was an Australian actress celebrated for her beauty, intelligence, and commanding screen presence. She rose to prominence during the 1950s and 1960s, a period in which she es...

item.description: Confusion and political speculation grew in Karnataka over reports that Chief Minister Siddaramaiah may tender his resignation amid ongoing leadership discussions within the Congress government. Atten...

item.title: Why Real Milk Is Better Than Creamers for Children’s Growth and Development
item.description: This Children’s Day feature focuses on the importance of giving children real milk instead of milk creamers in their daily diet, especially at breakfast. The article celebrates Nigerian children and h...

item.description: The latest continental update highlights a range of pressing health, humanitarian and socio-economic developments across Africa. In the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo), the World Health Organi...

item.title: Kalonzo urges government action on school safety reforms following Utumishi Girls Academy fire
item.description: Wiper Party leader Kalonzo Musyoka has called on the Kenyan government to move beyond mourning and prayers following the tragic fire incident at Utumishi Girls Academy and instead implement urgent and...

item.title: Reader advice requested: difficulty pronouncing a family member’s partner’s name
item.description: The article presents a weekly reader participation feature from The Washington Post’s advice column series centered on Carolyn Hax. In this installment, readers are invited to respond to a submitted q...

item.title: Tanzanian Parliament Debates U.S. Proposed Sanctions Bill and Calls for Diplomatic Engagement

item.title: Comelec names Elmer Catulpos as new 1Tahanan party-list representative in 20th Congress
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially proclaimed Elmer Catulpos as the new representative of the 1Tahanan party-list in the 20th Congress following the resignation of its first nominee....
